@graph.description: Semaglutide is a GLP-1 receptor agonist, FDA-approved as Ozempic, Wegovy, and Rybelsus, backed by a large multi-trial Phase 3 program spanning weight management, type 2 diabetes, cardiovascular risk reduction, and kidney outcomes — a categorically stronger evidence tier than the RUO peptides elsewhere in this series.
